headlines.headline: Arnos Marketplace to host investor day focused on data analytics strategy

sentiment.reasoning: Investor days are typically neutral events that provide transparency but do not immediately alter financial performance.

headlines.headline: Talvyn Goods secures $650M contract with a top-tier research institute

headlines.headline: Arnos Marketplace completes strategic acquisition to strengthen supply chain optimization

sentiment.reasoning: Acquisitions aimed at supply chain optimization are intended to improve margins and operational efficiency over time.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
